message:
feat: interactive allowlist audit system, collision-resistant backup naming, and schema v6 migration

Interactive allowlist audit (new feature):
- Add interactive_allowlist_audit table (schema v6) for tracking when
  users add commands to the allowlist via interactive prompts, recording
  the command, pattern added, option type (exact/temporary/path_specific),
  config file, cwd, and username.
- Add dcg history interactive subcommand to query audit entries with
  --limit, --option type filter, and --json output.
- Add path-scoped allowlist entries: new --path flag on allowlist add-pattern
  and add-exact commands restricts entries to specific directory globs.
- Interactive allowlist flow now prompts for target (exact command vs
  matched rule), path scope (current directory vs global), and lifetime
  (permanent vs 24-hour temporary).

Backup naming:
- update.rs: generate_unique_backup_name() prevents collisions when
  multiple backups share the same version+timestamp by appending
  nanosecond suffix and sequential counter.
- BackupEntry gains artifact_name field to track actual backup basename
  independently of the legacy naming convention.
- backup_artifact_name() helper used consistently for pruning and listing.

Schema migration:
- Bump CURRENT_SCHEMA_VERSION from 5 to 6 with migrate_v5_to_v6()
  adding the interactive_allowlist_audit table and indexes.

Other improvements:
- git.rs: Extended git operation support.
- normalize.rs: Minor normalization fix.
- trace.rs: Refactored tracing output formatting.
- output/mod.rs, output/tables.rs: Table rendering adjustments.
- tests/cli_e2e.rs: Additional end-to-end test coverage.
- .beads/issues.jsonl: Beads metadata updates.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
